mapper.select: select co.Code, co.Name, co.Continent, co.Region, co.SurfaceArea, co.IndepYear, co.Population, co.LifeExpectancy, co.GNP, co.GNPOld, co.LocalName, co.GovernmentForm, co.HeadOfState, co.Capital, co.Code2, ci.ID as city_ID, ci.Name as city_Name, ci.CountryCode as city_CountryCode, ci.District as city_District, ci.Population as city_Population from country co left join city ci on co.Code = ci.CountryCode where co.Code = #{code}

select co.Code, co.Name, co.Continent, co.Region, co.SurfaceArea, co.IndepYear, co.Population, co.LifeExpectancy, co.GNP, co.GNPOld, co.LocalName, co.GovernmentForm, co.HeadOfState, co.Capital, co.Code2, ci.ID as city_ID, ci.Name as city_Name, ci.CountryCode as city_CountryCode, ci.District as city_District, ci.Population as city_Population, cl.CountryCode as lang_CountryCode, cl.Language as lang_Language, cl.IsOfficial as lang_IsOfficial, cl.Percentage as lang_Percentage from country co left join city ci on co.Code = ci.CountryCode left join countrylanguage cl on co.Code = cl.CountryCode where co.Code = #{code}
